term.description: Exact verbatim term key matching the bold cell from HOW-IT-WORKS.md vocab-seed

expansion.description: First-use expansion text for stable-code terms in human prose

replacement.description: Drop-in human-readable replacement for rename-candidate terms

kind.description: Whether this row covers one term (atomic) or a numbered family (family)

decode.description: For family rows: pattern describing how to resolve a specific instance (e.g. SMC-20) to its definition home
